Expected behavior on trigger: SnapToTrigger.Snap called with this transform position, Animator.Play('DoorOpen',0,0f) on myDoor, collider_porte SetActive(false), openTrigger set to false.

Call room3.SetLaser() on MonoBehaviour id 829909757 (GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4) to simulate first laser activation. When both lasers are true, Update() should auto-play doorAnim 'DoorOpen' (Animator fileID: 1865011923) and AudioSource winton (fileID: 829909759).

Optional regression check: Call room3.DesactivateLaser() after door opened. Expect no re-closing logic (doorOpen remains true, no further animation changes).

Room 3 logic (MonoBehaviour id 829909757, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4) with Animator doorAnim fileID 1865011923 and AudioSource winton fileID 829909759. Regression: Deactivate one laser after door opened using room3 (id 829909757). Expect no re-closing logic; doorOpen remains true, no additional animations.

Second SetLaser() on Room 3 MonoBehaviour id 829909757 (room3). Expect Update() to detect laser1 && laser2 && !doorOpen, set doorOpen=true, play Animator 'DoorOpen' on 1865011923 and play AudioSource 829909759.
Call DesactivateLaser() on Room 3 MonoBehaviour id 829909757 (room3) after door has opened. Expect no door re-close logic (doorOpen remains true).

Optionally validate Quit flow last. Target MonoBehaviour id 829909760 (GUID: e9bec2616c6206946b1a15b3faa151c2) is script 'QuitGame' on GameObject 'Room 3' (fileID: 829909756). This may terminate the app.

Invoke AnchorVisuals events on PrefabInstance 'Teleport Anchor' to cover visual state transitions. MonoBehaviour component MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID 3953368309659336407) corresponds to script Unity.VRTemplate.AnchorVisuals (script GUID b2dd7fabdb14fca498bd9e0def11ab19) with serialized settings from the scene: m_FadeAnimation fileID 8970193181346821320, m_Arrow fileID 8134302612814971439, m_TargetArrowHeight=1, m_ArrowAnimationDuration=0.375, and the provided AnimationCurve modifications. Expected: OnAnchorEnter plays fade forward and raises arrow; OnAnchorExit reverses fade and lowers arrow; HideArrowOnTeleport scales arrow to zero. These are public, parameterless MonoBehaviour methods and should be triggered to ensure coverage even if teleport interactor events are not fired automatically.
